## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Scenario content update

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] Relevant CLI commands tested locally

## Safety and Scope Checklist

- [ ] Change remains lab-only, educational, and authorised-use aligned.
- [ ] No offensive automation was added.
- [ ] No public-target scanning logic was added.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials were committed.
- [ ] Scenario domains remain `.test`, `localhost`, or internal service names.
- [ ] AI credentials are not placed in scenario folders, logs, images, or vulnerable containers.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out tradeoffs, known limitations, and follow-up tasks if any.
